examples: The upper shaft lining of no. 1 blast furnace for smelting high TiO2 bearing vanadic titanomagnetite is repaired by forcing and gunning methods.
Using analysis methods of orthogonal combination under the conditions of high alkalinity, sintering process on Vanadic Titanomagnetite are researched.
At last, based on above, the mine-exploiting model, which might made the recycling of titanium among vanadic titanomagnetite best, was figured out by using of optimum principle.
